name: Art of Combat: Fighting Dragons Championship

reviews.review_description: I bought this game expecting it to be one of the best. But when I played it,it did not live up to what it was supposed to
The game has nice graphics and gameplay. The graphics are better that in promo video, at least specials and environments. I think this is a great fighting game for its price

Art of combat is like Mortal Kombat or Street Fighter in VR. I like the multiple enemies and movements they have. I love the new player movement additions. Now you can Jump, make flying kicks and run... It is also nice that you can kick as much as you like even if there no stamina left. Overall, I think it is worth the price!
Forces controller use for movement even in a big room. Collisions feel very janky.

This is like Street Fighter in VR! Excellent idea with special moves and great graphics. I found it too easy though, so it would be nice if it was more challenging - the characters don’t fight like real fighters - they are too open and make themselves vulnerable for attack. I found the kicking a bit hit and miss - sometimes it didn’t come on when pressed.

reviews.review_title: Nice approach to combat arcade games
reviews.review_description:
I can say it is a good approach to fighting games like Tekken or Street Fighter in VR. I hope the developers continue evolving the game. I would love to have a fullbody tracking. It can be used as good workout as well.
It is a pretty recommendable game if you like boxing and fighting games.

Game still feels like it's in early development but it has so much potential. I've been waiting for a game like this for a long time so splashed out to support the development. I will add to my review as the game improves. 

Some feed back for the developers:

Everything feels great except the kicking system, it's off putting having to put your hand in a certain position to get a certain kick. I think just have left high kick, left low kick, left middle kick by pressing in the joy stick and then the same the other side. Without the stamina cancel for the kicks.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We'll try to implement the system you mention for the kicks and study how to make the kicks not dependant on stamina without unbalancing game difficulty. We'll be also adding other features like achievements and leaderboards, and continue improving gameplay and scenarios.

reviews.review_description:
This is the next step of fighting games. It is like Street fighter or Tekken in VR. First person fighting with specials, kicks and punches and freedom of movement roomscale and with joystick. Much more complete than current boxing games in quest.

Totally recomended game!

This game could be very good but it has in my opinion some serious issues. First i don‘t think but im not sure yet but it feels like you have no ellbow that you can use to block. Per example i need to be there exactly with my hands to block the kicks. Also many punches that you do don‘t impact on the enemy. The game is still frustrating for me. I would not recommend yet. Maybe i don‘t understand everything. So i cannot say for sure if everything is like it felt for me.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feed back. We will have in mind for future updates making visible the arm and elbow to make easier blocking opponent attacks. About the missed hits, keep in mind that when a hit is blocked by the hand or arm of the opponent it won't continue further. After that, the hand will require another minimum of movement to activate the attack again. To produce a damaging hit you have to avoid the hands, the forearms and feet of the opponent. Hope this help you!

reviews.review_description: If you loved playing street fighter...then this game is for you!!!! Good graphic (especially on the fighters details) and arcade gameplay makes this game a must if you want to have fun time doing hadoken (Powerballs) and many other special moves!!! In my opinion developers could make the special moves more accurate/easy to do with the next update (sometime the game could become frustrating...). Overall is a good game considering is also cheap!
